title: Tanjiro
description: A simple resource pack that adds the ability to change the appearance of the sword
body:
# For correct work you need Optifine or CITResewn



- The pack requires OptiFine, which can be downloaded here:
https://optifine.net/home
- Or, if you're playing on Fabric, this pack requires CIT Resewn:
https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn

# Set 

There is a sword of an anime character in this texturpack

- Rename any sword: "Nichirin" 
- [Full Set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/N9EHRtck/images/759e53531de4799c06c70e802d0b7330b76a161c.png) "Nichirin" 
![Full Set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/N9EHRtck/images/759e53531de4799c06c70e802d0b7330b76a161c.png)


# You may:
- Use this resource pack on your server.
- Use this resource pack in YouTube videos or similar content creation. Please remember to credit me if this is the case.
- Alter this resource pack for private use.
# You may NOT:
- Claim ownership over this resource pack or any of its assets.
- Redistribute this resource pack or any of its assets, edited or not, without my permission.
